anchor.snippet: an isomorphism is a structure-preserving mapping or morphism between two structures of the same type that can be reversed by an inverse mapping

a homomorphism is an isomorphism if and only if it is bijective
An isometry is an isomorphism of metric spaces
A homeomorphism is an isomorphism of topological spaces
A diffeomorphism is an isomorphism of spaces equipped with a differential structure
A symplectomorphism is an isomorphism of symplectic manifolds
A permutation is an automorphism of a set
